fato_historico: 2006: The 7.7 Mw Pangandaran tsunami earthquake severely affects the Indonesian island of Java, killing 668 people, and leaving more than 9,000 injured.
energia_do_dia: Today brings a gentle reminder that even after the most turbulent waves shift the landscape, the heart remains resilient. Much like the tides that shape our shores, your sensitivity is a superpower. It is a good time to embrace emotional healing, gather your four-leaf clovers of luck, and find comfort in the soft, steady rhythm of your own soul.
frase_do_dia: Your gentle spirit holds the power to bloom amidst any shifting tide.
significado_numero: A powerful number reflecting harmony and building foundations for the future.
conselho: Prioritize self-care and surround yourself with those who truly cherish your light.
